---
title: "Critical History of Christian Literature and Doctrine from the Death of the Apostles to the Nicene COuncil"
---

## Critical History of Christian Literature and Doctrine from the Death of the Apostles to the Nicene COuncil

**Author:** James Donaldson
**Date:** 1864-1866
**Imprint:** London: Macmillan

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
